TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: 泰雅姓名學
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == lalu likuy qu Batu.lalu qani sllwan bnkis squ batul.mayung na motux tayal.wal M'gaga na mlikuy tayal balay ga,yasa thuyay mquzit batul squ papak.aki blaq mrkyas yabut khangan batul mrkyas muci bnkis. tlalu squ Batu. Batu , hani ga piyux calay tu'i nya ,yani nka ngahi ga ,mbatu calay san ta ga , tyaba ru cka nya ga myasa calay , phpuyun ta ngahi ini ga statah ta ga , tyaba ru cka nya ga myasa calay , phpuyun ta ngahi ini ga statah ta ga , ni'un ta ga tlpah calay ,yaca san myan mbatu calay ngahi , ru kruma ga psya'an ta c'oli tyaba ktu , sktu calay ga batu san myan uyi , mtumaw ru , nanu Batu san! 這個Batu 有很多路 ,像是地瓜,
S.PHON: == lalu likuj qu βatu.lalu qani s~ɕllwan βnkis~ɕ s~ɕqu βatul.majuŋ na motux tajal.wal mʔɣaɣa na mlikuj tajal βalaj ɣa,jas~ɕa tħujaj mquzit βatul s~ɕqu papak.aki βlaq mrkjas~ɕ jaβut kħaŋan βatul mrkjas~ɕ muʦ~ʨi βnkis~ɕ. tlalu s~ɕqu βatu. βatu , ħani ɣa pijux ʦ~ʨalaj tuʔi nja ,jani nka ŋaħi ɣa ,mβatu ʦ~ʨalaj s~ɕan ta ɣa , tjaβa ru ʦ~ʨka nja ɣa mjas~ɕa ʦ~ʨalaj , pħpujun ta ŋaħi ini ɣa s~ɕtataħ ta ɣa , tjaβa ru ʦ~ʨka nja ɣa mjas~ɕa ʦ~ʨalaj , pħpujun ta ŋaħi ini ɣa s~ɕtataħ ta ɣa , niʔun ta ɣa tlpaħ ʦ~ʨalaj ,jaʦ~ʨa s~ɕan mjan mβatu ʦ~ʨalaj ŋaħi , ru kruma ɣa ps~ɕjaʔan ta ʦ~ʨʔoli tjaβa ktu , s~ɕktu ʦ~ʨalaj ɣa βatu s~ɕan mjan uji , mtumaw ru , nanu βatu s~ɕan! **βatu **** ,****,
S.FORM: == lalu likuy qu Batu.lalu qani sllwan bnkis squ batul.mayung na motux tayal.wal M'gaga na mlikuy tayal balay ga,yasa thuyay mquzit batul squ papak.aki blaq mrkyas yabut khangan batul mrkyas muci bnkis. tlalu squ Batu. Batu , hani ga piyux calay tu'i nya ,yani nka ngahi ga ,mbatu calay san ta ga , tyaba ru cka nya ga myasa calay , phpuyun ta ngahi ini ga statah ta ga , tyaba ru cka nya ga myasa calay , phpuyun ta ngahi ini ga statah ta ga , ni'un ta ga tlpah calay ,yaca san myan mbatu calay ngahi , ru kruma ga psya'an ta c'oli tyaba ktu , sktu calay ga batu san myan uyi , mtumaw ru , nanu Batu san! 這個Batu 有很多路 ,像是地瓜,
S.PHON: == lalu likuj qu βatu.lalu qani s~ɕllwan βnkis~ɕ s~ɕqu βatul.majuŋ na motux tajal.wal mʔɣaɣa na mlikuj tajal βalaj ɣa,jas~ɕa tħujaj mquzit βatul s~ɕqu papak.aki βlaq mrkjas~ɕ jaβut kħaŋan βatul mrkjas~ɕ muʦ~ʨi βnkis~ɕ. tlalu s~ɕqu βatu. βatu , ħani ɣa pijux ʦ~ʨalaj tuʔi nja ,jani nka ŋaħi ɣa ,mβatu ʦ~ʨalaj s~ɕan ta ɣa , tjaβa ru ʦ~ʨka nja ɣa mjas~ɕa ʦ~ʨalaj , pħpujun ta ŋaħi ini ɣa s~ɕtataħ ta ɣa , tjaβa ru ʦ~ʨka nja ɣa mjas~ɕa ʦ~ʨalaj , pħpujun ta ŋaħi ini ɣa s~ɕtataħ ta ɣa , niʔun ta ɣa tlpaħ ʦ~ʨalaj ,jaʦ~ʨa s~ɕan mjan mβatu ʦ~ʨalaj ŋaħi , ru kruma ɣa ps~ɕjaʔan ta ʦ~ʨʔoli tjaβa ktu , s~ɕktu ʦ~ʨalaj ɣa βatu s~ɕan mjan uji , mtumaw ru , nanu βatu s~ɕan! **βatu **** ,****,
